name: Hunan Tyen Machinery Co., Ltd
summary: Hunan Tyen Machinery Co., Ltd engages in the research, development, production, and sale of turbochargers, high-performance valves, cooling fans, and high-speed rail cooling fans in China. It offers diesel engine superchargers; gasoline engine turbocharger; and other products. The company was founded in 1950 and is based in Hengyang, China.
